_comment: Known modifier suffixes for model IDs. ExtractModifier consults this list to extract the modifier as a separate field rather than treating it as suffix overflow. Modifiers are matched longest-first to prevent shorter tokens (e.g. 'think') from shadowing longer ones (e.g. 'thinking'). SLICE-10 (rc2, ratified taxonomy URD bestiary-o54x): the Modifier field is a LIST, so multiple trailing modifiers compose losslessly. ADDED reasoning/multimodal (capability), turbo/fast (speed), instruct/chat/base (format/stage). Each is reclassified variant->modifier ONLY when it is NOT a curated families.json member of the resolved family (per-family member-guard) — so deepseek-chat, sonar-reasoning, qwen-turbo keep the token as their product-line variant.
